title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - LG Soft India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
LG Soft India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LG Soft India:
LG Soft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India!
